title: add darwin ci compilation test
body:
add a CI task that compiles libpod for a darwin target. it also checks gofmt
as well because that isn't run for non-linux platforms.

also addressed a review comment from wking on build tags that was not gotten
on the previous PR.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: also noteworthy, i set this to required for libpod given the amount of stuff we vendor and use
@baude #1034 does the same, but for Travis instead of Papr... I might actually prefer that one given that Travis has never given us trouble, while papr has consistently been a source of issues.

On Thu, Jul 05, 2018 at 10:33:00AM -0700, Brent Baude wrote:
> add a CI task that compiles libpod for a darwin target.

#1034 is already in flight to cover this.

> it also checks gofmt as well because that isn't run for non-linux
> platforms.

#1034 doesn't cover this at the moment; I'll add it shortly.

> also addressed a review comment from wking on build tags that was not gotten
> on the previous PR.

#1034 also covers this.
